requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — GSO / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——GSO / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——GSO / IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs placed on the Omani market are assessed for safety against the GSO standard that adopts IEC 62133-2 (Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems). Because GSO standards are largely transposed from IEC, an IEC 62133-2 test report from an accredited (ILAC/IECEE CB) laboratory is the practical evidence base accepted by DGSM for conformity of regulated lithium products. The standard covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and performance limits. Power banks operating in Oman's electrical environment (240 V, 50 Hz mains for the charger/adapter, same 50 Hz as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V) must be rated for the local input where mains-charged.
summary.zh: 投放阿曼市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组，依据采纳IEC 62133-2（含碱性或其他非酸性电解质的二次电芯和电池——便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求——第2部分：锂系统）的GSO标准进行安全评定。由于GSO标准多自IEC转化，由认可（ILAC/IECEE CB）实验室出具的IEC 62133-2测试报告是DGSM对受管制锂产品合格评定实际接受的证据基础。该标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及性能限值。在阿曼电气环境中工作的移动电源（充电器/适配器市电240 V、50 Hz，与中国同为50 Hz但额定电压不同于中国的220/380 V），如经市电充电，须按当地输入额定。
summary.zht: 投放阿曼市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，依據採納IEC 62133-2（含鹼性或其他非酸性電解質的二次電芯和電池——便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統）的GSO標準進行安全評定。由於GSO標準多自IEC轉化，由認可（ILAC/IECEE CB）實驗室出具的IEC 62133-2測試報告是DGSM對受管制鋰產品合格評定實際接受的證據基礎。該標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及性能限值。在阿曼電氣環境中工作的行動電源（充電器/適配器市電240 V、50 Hz，與中國同為50 Hz但額定電壓不同於中國的220/380 V），如經市電充電，須按當地輸入額定。

standards_or_laws: GSO standard adopting IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems
IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — base international standard transposed by GSO
IECEE CB Scheme test report — practical accredited-laboratory evidence accepted toward DGSM conformity

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment) and GB 18287 (lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but carries national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A test report issued by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is not automatically recognised by DGSM; Oman's conformity route references the GSO/IEC 62133-2 standard, so an IECEE CB / IEC 62133-2 report is the smoother path.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）和GB 18287（手机用锂离子电池）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则上存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的报告不会被DGSM自动认可；阿曼合格评定路径引用GSO/IEC 62133-2标准，故IECEE CB / IEC 62133-2报告是更顺畅的路径。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）和GB 18287（手機用鋰離子電池）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則上存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的報告不會被DGSM自動認可；阿曼合格評定路徑引用GSO/IEC 62133-2標準，故IECEE CB / IEC 62133-2報告是更順暢的路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because GSO transposes IEC 62133-2, the practical gap is converting GB 31241 evidence into an IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB report acceptable to DGSM. Key points: (1) test-severity differences between GB 31241 and IEC 62133-2 in crush and overcharge tests mean a GB report may not be a drop-in substitute; (2) DGSM conformity references the GSO/IEC version, not GB; (3) the charger/adapter of a mains-charged power bank must be rated for Oman's 240 V / 50 Hz supply. Exporters who already hold an IECEE CB IEC 62133-2 report are largely aligned; those holding only GB 31241 should obtain or convert to IEC 62133-2 testing from an accredited laboratory.
gap.zh: 由于GSO转化自IEC 62133-2，实际差距在于将GB 31241证据转换为DGSM可接受的IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB报告。要点：（1）GB 31241与IEC 62133-2在挤压和过充测试上的严苛程度差异，意味着GB报告未必可直接替代；（2）DGSM合格评定引用GSO/IEC版本，而非GB；（3）经市电充电的移动电源充电器/适配器须按阿曼240 V / 50 Hz供电额定。已持有IECEE CB IEC 62133-2报告的出口商基本对齐；仅持有GB 31241的出口商应取得或转换为由认可实验室出具的IEC 62133-2测试。
gap.zht: 由於GSO轉化自IEC 62133-2，實際差距在於將GB 31241證據轉換為DGSM可接受的IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB報告。要點：（1）GB 31241與IEC 62133-2在擠壓和過充測試上的嚴苛程度差異，意味著GB報告未必可直接替代；（2）DGSM合格評定引用GSO/IEC版本，而非GB；（3）經市電充電的行動電源充電器/適配器須按阿曼240 V / 50 Hz供電額定。已持有IECEE CB IEC 62133-2報告的出口商基本對齊；僅持有GB 31241的出口商應取得或轉換為由認可實驗室出具的IEC 62133-2測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — DGSM conformity for regulated lithium products references the GSO standard adopting IEC 62133-2; an accredited IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB report is the practical safety evidence accepted before Omani market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman assesses portable lithium cell and pack safety against the GSO standard that adopts IEC 62133-2, so an accredited IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB test report is the practical evidence base for DGSM conformity. Chinese GB 31241 certification, despite sharing IEC ancestry, is not automatically accepted because of national test-severity deviations and because the Omani route references the GSO/IEC version. Mains-charged power banks must also be rated for Oman's 240 V / 50 Hz input.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿曼依据采纳IEC 62133-2的GSO标准评定便携式锂电芯及电池组安全，故认可的IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB测试报告是DGSM合格评定的实际证据基础。中国GB 31241认证虽与IEC同源，但因国家测试严苛度偏差且阿曼路径引用GSO/IEC版本而不被自动接受。经市电充电的移动电源还须按阿曼240 V / 50 Hz输入额定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿曼依據採納IEC 62133-2的GSO標準評定便攜式鋰電芯及電池組安全，故認可的IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB測試報告是DGSM合格評定的實際證據基礎。中國GB 31241認證雖與IEC同源，但因國家測試嚴苛度偏差且阿曼路徑引用GSO/IEC版本而不被自動接受。經市電充電的行動電源還須按阿曼240 V / 50 Hz輸入額定。

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — standards store (GSO adoption of IEC 62133-2)
